Bash(authenticated" because no auth header is present.

Fix: Added redirect: ''manual'' and 307/308 redirect handling to ALL
Next.js API routes that proxy to the backend. This preserves the
Authorization header across redirects, matching the pattern already
used by the owner dashboard route.

Affected routes: catch-all proxy, payments, properties, units, tenants,
staff, maintenance, notifications, reports, caretaker/dashboard,
tenant/dashboard, and all sub-routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
